overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, crossing illuminated streets and ascending to an elevated pedestrian walkway with dynamic color-changing neon lighting. The environment features high-rise glass towers, digital billboards, and a covered promenade with shifting LED ceiling colors.

turns right to approach the sidewalk and stairway entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at night, dominated by a massive curved glass skyscraper with teal neon accents. The camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk as futuristic vehicles pass by, then turns right toward a sidewalk lined with palm trees and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairway entrance with prominent signage

events.description: moves from open street to covered area beneath the 'SEOCHO' sign
begins ascending the wide concrete staircase to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking up a wide concrete staircase beneath a large illuminated 'SEOCHO' sign, following another pedestrian

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored jacket ascending the stairs ahead of camera
person in dark clothing standing near the glass railing looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: large illuminated white sign spanning across the walkway entrance
wide stairs with metal edge strips and reflective flooring
transparent safety barrier with metal frame overlooking the street below
tall rectangular light fixture with glowing white panels

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under a large illuminated 'SEOCHO' sign and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase. Glass railings line the left side overlooking the street below, while other pedestrians move up the stairs ahead. The environment transitions from open sky to a sheltered, architecturally modern entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian promenade with dynamic LED ceiling and living green walls

events.description: enters the long covered corridor with color-changing LED ceiling panels
ceiling lights shift from green-yellow to orange-red tones
ceiling lights transition to purple and blue hues

agents.ego_description: strolling through a futuristic corridor with color-shifting neon ceiling lights, passing benches and digital advertisement walls

notable_agents.action: group of three people standing and conversing near a digital advertisement display
person sitting on a metal bench looking at a device

entered.detail: long continuous ceiling panel with programmable LED lights shifting through rainbow colors
continuous curved screen displaying fashion advertisements and corporate branding
modern minimalist seating along the walkway next to planters
large rectangular planters with lush greenery and palm trees
yellow automated kiosks against the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a long, covered pedestrian promenade featuring a striking LED ceiling that cycles through vibrant colors from green to red to purple. The right wall displays continuous digital advertisements, while the left side features benches, vending machines, and planter boxes with greenery. The highly reflective floor mirrors the shifting neon lights above as pedestrians walk and sit along the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling cyberpunk street level up into a vibrant, sheltered pedestrian promenade. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath a massive curved glass skyscraper with teal neon accents, before turning right along a sidewalk lined with palm trees and digital billboards. As the camera moves under a large illuminated SEOCHO sign, the scene shifts from the open city air to an ascent up a wide concrete staircase flanked by glass railings. The movement then flows seamlessly into a long, covered corridor where the environment transforms into a tunnel of light, featuring an LED ceiling that cycles through green, red, and purple hues. This progression concludes as the camera glides across a highly reflective floor that mirrors the shifting neon lights and digital advertisements lining the walls of the modern promenade.
